assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan explicitly shows 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull' before creating the task branch. It does not use git checkout main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan shows 'gh pr create --base TC-9005' and explicitly states 'The PR targets --base TC-9005 (the feature branch), NOT --base main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly states 'The task branch is TC-9205 (the task issue ID). The target branch is TC-9005 (the feature branch). These are distinct.'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: The Code Inspection section lists all three files: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs ('Read sibling migration file'), migration/src/lib.rs ('Read registration pattern'), and entity/src/advisory.rs ('Verify status column not referenced').

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: The commit command explicitly includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code'.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: The commit message is 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows Conventional Commits format (type=feat, scope=migration). The footer includes 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: The plan has a dedicated 'Target Branch Extraction' section that states: 'From the task description's Target Branch section, the value is TC-9005. This is a feature branch (not main).'
